title: 2 Terminology
body_text:
2	Terminology
2.1	Definitions
Branch Number
The Branch Number is a 5-digit number used to identify the branch of a Canadian financial institution. The Branch Number and the Institution Number make up the Transit Number.
Business Day
A Business Day is a week day including Monday to Friday except for statutory holidays that fall on or are observed on a week day.
CAS
Current Account Services (CAS) is the banking system Central 1 uses to maintain Central 1 accounts, settlements, and balances.
CAS Online
CAS Online provides financial institutions with access to their Central 1 account information.
Central 1 Account Number
Central 1 Account Numbers are nine digits and represent the financial institution芒聙聶s Transit Number with a leading zero. The account number consists of a 3-digit Institution Number followed by a 5-digit Branch Number (e.g., 080912010, 082812010). The Central 1 Account Number for a Canadian dollar account is the same as that for a US dollar, Sterling, or Euro account.
Client Centre
The Client Centre is a digital portal that provides secured access to Central 1芒聙聶s applications and to information and news about our products and services.
Client Centre Users
Client Centre Users log in to the Client Centre to access certain applications. Client Centre Users can芒聙聶t manage CPS Admin Security Officers or other Client Centre Users.
Electronic Posting Advices
Electronic Posting Advices provide the details of manual transactions that are posted to Central 1 accounts. There are two advices codes (CHQ4 and ADVC).
Institution Number
The Institution Number is a 3-digit number assigned by Payments Canada that identifies a financial institution (e.g., 809 for BC credit unions and 828 for Ontario credit unions). The Branch Number and the Institution Number make up the Transit Number. The Institution Number is sometimes known as the route number.
Transit Number
The Transit Number is the Institution Number together with the Branch Number (e.g., 80912010, 82812010).
User Management
User Management is an application used to add, edit, and delete Client Centre Users. It is also used to edit and delete other CPS Admin Security Officers and to manage 2-step security tokens. Eventually, User Management will replace CPS Admin.
END
